untranslatable_reason: The signal requires measurement of (1) 'trend lasting at least 20 bars' — requires trend detection algorithm not in allowed indicators; (2) 'price moved 2% beyond prior swing point' — requires swing point detection not available; (3) '2+ consecutive confirming bars' — requires multi-bar pattern matching logic not expressible with single-bar conditions. Core concept of confirmation bias-driven trend continuation is directionally captured, but precise entry/exit gatekeeping cannot be fully translated.
translation_notes: Adapted to use sma_20 (20-bar MA), pivot points (s1/r1 as swing references), and body direction as proxies for trend and confirmation. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Stop loss set to 2% per minimum_move_percent parameter. Target regime restricted to TRENDING states. The '2+ confirming bars' filter and swing-point-relative moves are not expressible in the allowed condition syntax.
